description: Zoho Cliq is a real‑time messaging and collaboration platform that offers chat, video calls, file sharing, and integration with other Zoho and third‑party apps.
authentication: OAuth 2.0 (client credentials and authorization code flows)
self_serve: Yes – free tier available with limited features; paid plans unlock additional storage, admin controls, and advanced integrations
api_surface: REST API for creating and managing channels, sending and retrieving messages, managing users, and accessing file attachments. API endpoints are documented under the Zoho Cliq API section.
buildability: Supported – Zoho provides SDKs for Java, Python, Node.js, and .NET, as well as a comprehensive API reference and sample code.
main_blocker: Limited API coverage for certain advanced features (e.g., video call controls, detailed analytics) and rate limits may affect large‑scale integrations.
